title: tempting molten indian chocolate biryani
description: a quick-fix indian-inspired dish featuring dark chocolate chips, kombu-extract, and crispy onions

ingredients.name: basmati rice
ingredients.notes: use short-grain rice for better texture

ingredients.name: kombu extract
ingredients.notes: make sure to use the cold-extract

ingredients.name: ginger paste
ingredients.notes: grate fresh ginger for best flavor

instructions: heat ghee in a large wooden-board pan over medium heat
add sliced onions and cook until crispy, about 3 minutes
add ginger paste and cook for 1 minute
add basmati rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted
add kombu extract, cinnamon powder, cardamom powder, and salt; stir to combine
add dark chocolate chips and stir to melt
add cashews and stir to combine
transfer the mixture to a serving dish
serve hot, garnished with additional cashews and onions if desired
